title: Luca's Yummy Sounds
synopsis: Baby Luca explores different foods and the delightful sounds they make when he eats them, from crunchy apples to slurpy soup, creating a joyful mealtime adventure filled with onomatopoeia and happy discovery.

pages.text: Luca sits in his high chair. Time to eat!

illustration.description: A cheerful baby boy with warm brown skin and dark curly hair sits in a bright yellow high chair. He has big brown eyes and is wearing a soft blue bib with colorful fruit patterns. The kitchen background shows warm peach walls with simple shelves holding colorful bowls.
illustration.alt: Baby Luca sitting happily in his high chair ready for mealtime

illustration.description: Luca holds a red apple slice with both hands, taking a big bite with his mouth wide open. Golden crumbs and juice drops are visible around his smiling face. The apple slices on his tray are bright red with white flesh, arranged in a cheerful semicircle.
illustration.alt: Luca crunching on apple slices with sound effects

illustration.description: Luca squeezes soft banana pieces between his fingers, creating a delighted giggling expression. Yellow banana mush covers his hands and tray. His mother, a woman with long black hair and kind brown eyes wearing a coral sweater, watches lovingly from behind.
illustration.alt: Luca squishing banana pieces with his hands

illustration.description: Luca chomps enthusiastically on bright orange carrot sticks, his cheeks puffed out comically. Orange carrot pieces are scattered on his blue bib and white tray. Warm afternoon sunlight streams through a nearby window, creating a cozy atmosphere.
illustration.alt: Luca chomping on orange carrot sticks

illustration.description: Luca carefully holds a small spoon with tomato soup, making exaggerated slurping sounds. Red soup drips gently from the spoon back into a bright green bowl. Steam rises in soft white curls, and his expression shows concentration and joy.
illustration.alt: Luca slurping soup from a spoon

illustration.description: Luca breaks whole grain crackers in half, golden crumbs flying around him in the air. His face shows delight and surprise at the snapping sound. The crackers are round and golden brown, and some pieces have already been eaten with tiny bite marks visible.
illustration.alt: Luca breaking crackers with a satisfying snap

illustration.description: Luca tilts back in his chair, holding his blue sippy cup with both hands, drinking milk with obvious gulping sounds. White milk drips down his chin onto his bib. His eyes are closed contentedly, and his cheeks are rosy from eating.
illustration.alt: Luca drinking milk from his sippy cup

pages.text: All done! Luca claps - CLAP, CLAP!

illustration.description: Luca claps his messy hands together with pure joy, food remnants still on his fingers and face. His parents, a loving couple with warm smiles, clap along behind him. The scene shows the happy chaos of a finished meal with colorful food bits scattered around.
illustration.alt: Happy Luca clapping with his parents after finishing his meal

metadata.illustrationStyle: Soft, rounded shapes with warm pastel colors. Gentle watercolor feel. Large, friendly faces. High contrast for baby eyes. Simple backgrounds.

questions.question: What sound do the apples make?
questions.explanation: Apples make a CRUNCH sound when Luca bites them!

questions.question: What color is Luca's high chair?
questions.explanation: Luca sits in a bright yellow high chair during mealtime.

questions.question: What does Luca do at the end?
questions.explanation: Luca claps his hands - CLAP, CLAP! - when he's all done eating.
